pi_items.source: examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/fix_zombie_process_leak/setup_task.sh (TASK_DIR variable sets up /home/ga/zombie-debug and all worker/compose artifacts are created there)
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/fix_zombie_process_leak/setup_task.sh (docker-compose.yml content defines a single service named 'job-worker')
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/fix_zombie_process_leak/verifier.py (verifier awards the zombie-count points only when the count is <= 2)

privileged_info_summary: setup_task.sh fabricates the Docker Compose project entirely inside /home/ga/zombie-debug, creating the worker.py/Dockerfile/docker-compose.yml that define the job-worker service and container and so the metadata path/name values are accurate; the verifier enforces a zombie count of 2 or fewer (not 3) before awarding points, and no external dataset is consumed because every artifact is generated during setup.
